San Francisco’s cool foggy climate is reminiscent of these highland regions in the tropics, so it is no wonder that our Andean Cloud Forest Collection has flourished. One of our most striking features are the Andean wax palms (*Ceroxylon quindiuense*), the highest occurring and tallest species of palm in the world.
